title: fix(deployer): watch workspace package source files during mastra dev

relatedIssues.title: Turborepo watch on mono repo mastra setup
Is file watching supported in monorepos with Mastra's dev server?

summary: During `mastra dev`, workspace packages are marked external by the alias-optimized-deps plugin, so Rollup never watches them for changes. This PR adds a `workspace-file-watcher` Rollup plugin that uses `this.addWatchFile()` in `buildStart` to register workspace package src/ and dist/ files with Rollup's watcher. It recursively collects .ts/.js/.tsx/.jsx/.mts/.mjs/.cts/.cjs files, skipping node_modules. When a watched file changes, Rollup triggers a rebuild. The approach preserves existing bundling behavior — workspace packages remain external. Includes comprehensive tests and a changeset.
maintainerNotes: Well-structured community PR that fixes a real pain point (2 open issues). The author initially took a riskier approach (bundling workspace packages), but maintainer @TheIsrael1 provided detailed review feedback suggesting the simpler `addWatchFile()` approach. The author incorporated this feedback in subsequent commits. The current implementation is the safe `addWatchFile` approach — no changes to bundling, tree-shaking, or module resolution. CI checks are stuck in PENDING state (tests never ran after the 'Setup actions with secrets' step completed), which is likely a CI infrastructure issue for external contributors rather than a code problem. Needs a maintainer to re-trigger CI and do a final review of the implementation. The `collectSourceFiles` helper is clean and well-scoped. Tests mock fs correctly and cover edge cases (missing dirs, non-source files, plugin ordering).
